name: AbGPT
description: Generate antibody sequences using finetuned ProtGPT2 protein language model. Successfully generated library of 15,000 BCR sequences with strong diversity and developability profile.
capabilities: Generate antibody sequences using finetuned ProtGPT2 protein language model
Successfully generated library of 15,000 BCR sequences with strong diversity and developability profile

seed_sequence.description: Optional seed amino acid sequence to condition generation on

chain_type.description: Type of antibody chain to generate

num_sequences.description: Number of antibody sequences to generate

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling diversity vs conservation (higher = more diverse)
